ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the algorithm was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the algorithm's details */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category or type of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_data" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark data point */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being benchmarked */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the benchmark */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the benchmark */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the benchmark */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the benchmark */,
  "cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time taken by the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the benchmark data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the benchmark data */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the benchmark */,
  "disk_io" INTEGER /* Disk I/O operations during the benchmark */,
  "network_io" INTEGER /* Network I/O operations during the benchmark */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption during the benchmark */,
  "runtime_environment" TEXT /* Additional details about the runtime environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_data_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "hardware_specs" TEXT /* Hardware specifications of the environment */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the environment was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the environment details */,
  "compiler_version" TEXT /* Version of the compiler used */,
  "library_versions" TEXT /* Versions of libraries used in the environment */,
  "network_speed" INTEGER /* Network speed of the environment */,
  "storage_type" TEXT /* Type of storage used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark data point */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the benchmark was run */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., user, organization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the source details */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., user, organization, API) */,
  "source_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_sources_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_sources_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmark_data ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user details */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred language, notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark data point */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the upload was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the upload details */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmark_data ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "algorithm_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first algorithm being compared */,
  "algorithm_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second algorithm being compared */,
  "comparison_result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison (e.g., which algorithm performed better) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comparison was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the comparison details */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was performed */,
  "comparison_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_comparisons_algorithm_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id2") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_comparisons_algorithm_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id1") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
